headline: Chevron’s Argentina Push Reshapes Growth Outlook And Risk Profile
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) and partners have finalized contracts for a $3b natural gas liquids project in Argentina. The project is aimed at expanding Argentina's export capacity and supporting the country's shale industry. Chevron is also pursuing participation in a $13.8b unconventional oil project in the Vaca Muerta formation under the RIGI investment regime. These commitments represent some of the largest new investments targeting Argentina's shale sector. For investors tracking NYSE:CVX, these...
